utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey ! Oh right , tonight was your party .

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Oh wow , you look great ! Glad you could make it .

emotion_cause.span: 2_you look great ! Glad you could make it .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh well , you know , the gala had to end sometime .

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Do not go anywhere , I will be right back .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , sure . All right , whose court is the ball in now ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I thought there was not a ball ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , come on ! He is glad that I came , he does not want me to go anywhere , balls flying all over the place !

emotion_cause.span: 6_I thought there was not a ball ?

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Rachel , this is my friend Tom .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , go on ! You telling people about me ?

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: You two could really hit it off ! I am gonna go mingle .

emotion_cause.span: 10_You two could really hit it off !

utterances.speaker: Tom
utterances.text: So you work at Bloomingdale , huh ? My mom calls it Bloomies .

emotion_cause.span: 11_you work at Bloomingdale , huh ? My mom calls it Bloomies .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No , it is all right , you can just drop the act Tommy . I know what going on here .

utterances.speaker: Tom
utterances.text: I am gonna go talk to uh , a friend .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , yeah , you go talk to your friend . You tell him , " Nice try . "

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Man ! He just keeps lobbing them up and I just keep knocking them right out of the park !

emotion_cause.span: 17_He just keeps lobbing them up and I just keep knocking them right out of the park !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I think I need a drink .
